description_long: This is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a full-rim frame with a subtle woodgrain pattern, giving it a sophisticated and urban look. The frame has a classic rounded rectangular shape with slightly thick rims, providing both durability and a bold aesthetic. The lenses are dark-tinted, with one lens appearing slightly lighter than the other, suggesting a unique or custom design. The temples are straight and robust, matching the frame's woodgrain texture and extending back with a gentle curve for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge is integrated smoothly into the frame, maintaining a seamless and cohesive appearance. No visible brand logo or embellishments are present, emphasizing a minimalist yet fashionable style suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of dark-tinted sunglasses with a woodgrain-patterned, full-rim frame and rounded rectangular lenses, featuring a bold and minimalist urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-rim, rounded rectangular frame and the dark-tinted lenses, with the woodgrain pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, thick temples with a gentle curve at the end and the consistent woodgrain texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame and temples, as well as the symmetrical lens shape and bridge integration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the temple design and thickness, with the woodgrain pattern continuing along the arm.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a rounded rectangular geometry with a full-rim structure, moderately thick rims, and a seamless, continuous design. The temples are straight with a gentle curve at the ends, and the overall style is bold and minimalist, with no additional embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark-tinted, with one lens appearing slightly lighter than the other, providing a subtle contrast. The tint is uniform and opaque, offering strong sun protection without any mirrored or gradient effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a standard integrated type, smoothly connecting the two lenses with a gentle curve and no visible nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, moderately thick, and feature the same woodgrain pattern as the frame. There are no engravings, embellishments, or decorative elements, maintaining a clean and cohesive look.
